description: Lock postal_money_orders to modern postal remittance instruments, not Classical courier or contract-registry payments.

checks.reason: The sourced node is the U.S. Post Office Department money-order system introduced during the Civil War.
Civic contract registries are not the source-backed causal boundary for postal remittance instruments.
Postal money orders performed bank-like funds-transfer functions at post offices.
Earlier postal relay systems are postal infrastructure predecessors, not an ancient money-order mechanism.
